item.title: Afcons Infrastructure Ltd Surges 8.92% to Day's High of Rs 327.85 — Outperforms Sector by 3.46 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.71% on 15 Apr 2026, yet Afcons Infrastructure Ltd outpaced the broader market with an 8.92% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 327.85. This 5.46-percentage-point outperformance over the Capital Goods sector’s 3.46% rise signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Divgi Torqtransfer Systems Ltd Surges 11.79% to Day's High of Rs 760 — Outperforms Sector by 7.31 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.71% on 15 Apr 2026, yet Divgi Torqtransfer Systems Ltd outpaced the broader market with an 11.79% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 760. This 7.31-percentage-point outperformance over the Auto Components & Equipments sector’s 2.32% rise highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a general market uplift. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Tata Power Company Ltd Surges 3.32% to Day's High of Rs 423.9 — Outperforms Sector by 1.84 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.71% on 15 Apr 2026, yet Tata Power Company Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 3.32% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 423.9. This 1.84-percentage-point outperformance over the Power sector's 2.08% rise signals a stock-specific strength rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Ashoka Buildcon Ltd. Surges 7.67% to Day's High of Rs 132.3 — Outperforms Sector by 4.37 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.71% on 15 Apr 2026, yet Ashoka Buildcon Ltd. outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.67% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 132.3. This 4.37-percentage-point outperformance over the Engineering sector’s 2.74% rise signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd. Rallies 5.0% and Approaches 50 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.71% on 15 Apr 2026, yet Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd. outpaced the benchmark with a 5.0% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 368. This 3.12 percentage-point outperformance signals a stock-specific momentum shift rather than a broad market lift. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 251.15
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 251.15 on 15 Jun 2026, Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of strong technical signals and sustained price momentum over recent sessions. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Unipro Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 36.62
item.description: With a sustained 21-day winning streak, Unipro Technologies Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 36.62 on 15 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 50.27% gain over this period. This rally is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and strong price momentum, despite the stock slightly underperforming its sector on the day. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Seven-Day Slide Pushes ISL Consulting Ltd to 52-Week Low of Rs 22.18
item.description: ISL Consulting Ltd’s share price declined sharply to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.22.18 on 15 Apr 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting persistent challenges in its financial performance and valuation metrics. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Devine Impex Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 7.38 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Devine Impex Ltd closed lower, slipping to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 7.38 on 15 Apr 2026. This decline comes despite a broader market rally, with the Sensex advancing 1.74% on the same day. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Paisalo Digital Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 42.3
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 42.3 on 15 Jun 2026, Paisalo Digital Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This rally is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained outperformance relative to its sector and the broader market. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Indus Finance Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 64.9
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 64.9 on 15 Jun 2026, Indus Finance Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outperforming its sector and the broader market with a sustained rally that has seen a 29.48% gain over the past six trading sessions. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Timken India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 3610
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 3610 on 15 Apr 2026, Timken India Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 39.21% gain over the past year and significantly outperforming the Sensex's modest 1.90% rise. This milestone reflects a strong confluence of technical indicators and sustained price momentum that has propelled the stock well above its key moving averages. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rekvina Labs Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 41.47
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Rekvina Labs Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 41.47 on 15 Apr 2026, propelled by a sustained six-day rally that has delivered a 12.54% gain. This milestone caps a remarkable price journey from a low of Rs 6.75 in the past year, underscoring a powerful momentum shift in the stock’s technical landscape. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Global Infratech & Finance Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 21.54
item.description: With a remarkable 15-day winning streak culminating in a fresh 52-week high of Rs 21.54 on 15 Apr 2026, Global Infratech & Finance Ltd has demonstrated exceptional price momentum, surging over 1145% during this period despite a modest underperformance relative to its sector. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Integrated Proteins Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 86.35
item.description: After an impressive rally of over 80% in the past 20 trading sessions, Integrated Proteins Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 86.35 on 15 Apr 2026, marking a significant milestone for the micro-cap edible oil company. This breakout comes amid a broader market environment where the Sensex is advancing steadily, albeit with some technical caution. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sizemasters Technology Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 364
item.description: With a remarkable surge to Rs 364 on 15 Apr 2026, Sizemasters Technology Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week and all-time high, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Shantai Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 67.74
item.description: From a low of Rs 11.15 to a new peak of Rs 67.74, Shantai Industries Ltd has surged an impressive 354.57% over the past year, far outpacing the Sensex’s modest 1.90% gain. This remarkable rally culminated today as the stock touched its fresh 52-week high, fuelled by a confluence of strong technical signals and sustained price momentum. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Oxford Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 15.05
item.description: After a sustained rally spanning 21 consecutive trading sessions, Oxford Industries Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 15.05 on 15 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 50.2% gain over this period and signalling robust price momentum. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Andhra Sugars Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 89
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 89 on 15 Jun 2026, Andhra Sugars Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This rally is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators across weekly and monthly timeframes, reflecting robust momentum despite a mixed broader market backdrop. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Alfavision Overseas (India) Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 15.58
item.description: After a sustained rally spanning 21 consecutive trading sessions, Alfavision Overseas (India) Ltd surged to a new 52-week high of Rs 15.58 on 15 Jun 2026, marking a remarkable 114.01% gain over this period. This milestone underscores the stock’s strong price momentum, supported by a confluence of technical indicators signalling robust upward trends. Time: 8 minutes ago
